rule "R0"
when
    ( $p0_0 : T0($b0_0_0 : f1) and $p0_1 : T0(!(f2 != false), $b0_1_0 : f2, f2 == false) )
    or
    ( $p0_0 : T0($b0_0_0 : f1) and $p0_1 : T0(!(f2 != false), $b0_1_0 : f2, f2 == false) )
then
    modify($p0_1) { setF2(true), setF1($p0_0.getF1()) }
end
rule "R2"
salience 8
when
    ( $p2_0 : T0(f1 >= "ab", $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0) )
    or
    ( $p2_0 : T0(f1 >= "ab", $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0) )
then
    insertLogical(new T1(false, true, $b2_0_1, $p2_0.isF2()));
end
